summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Location CRUD and wallet_enabled feature for Jolly's Kafe. All 15 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI testing verified all new features work correctly: Add Location form, wallet toggle, delete location, and dynamic location loading across all pages.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/locations returns all active locations with wallet_enabled field
Backend: All locations have wallet_enabled boolean field
Backend: GET /api/admin/locations returns all locations including inactive (admin auth)
Backend: POST /api/admin/locations creates new location with auto site_settings
Backend: Site settings auto-created for new locations
Backend: PUT /api/admin/locations/{id} toggles wallet_enabled
Backend: PUT /api/admin/locations/{id} updates location name
Backend: DELETE /api/admin/locations/{id} soft-deletes (sets is_active=False)
Backend: Duplicate location creation correctly rejected (400)
Backend: GET /api/admin/site-settings returns settings for active locations only
Backend: Admin endpoints require authentication (401 without auth)
Frontend: Admin Site Settings page renders with Add Location button
Frontend: Add Location form opens with name, address, wallet toggle fields
Frontend: Add Location form creates new location successfully
Frontend: Wallet toggle buttons visible for all locations (5 toggles)
Frontend: Ordering toggle buttons visible for all locations
Frontend: Delete location buttons visible for all locations
Frontend: Edit Hours buttons visible for all locations
Frontend: Admin Menu Management loads locations from API (dropdown)
Frontend: Admin Orders page has location filter dropdown from API
Frontend: Resident Balance page filters to wallet-enabled locations only (Oakmere, Willowmere)
Frontend: Transaction Report page filters to wallet-enabled locations only
Frontend: Public Menu Catalog loads locations from API (Select Location dropdown)
seed_data_creation: Test locations created and cleaned up during testing. Soft-deleted test locations remain in DB with is_active=False.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Location CRUD feature fully implemented and tested. Key points: (1) Locations now fetched from GET /api/locations API instead of hardcoded array. (2) wallet_enabled field added to locations - Oakmere and Willowmere have wallet=True, others False. (3) Admin can add/edit/delete locations from Site Settings page. (4) Delete is soft-delete (sets is_active=False). (5) Resident Balance and Transaction Report pages filter to wallet-enabled locations only. (6) All admin endpoints require cookie-based auth.

location_crud.create: Working - POST /api/admin/locations with auto site_settings creation
location_crud.update: Working - PUT /api/admin/locations/{id} for name, address, wallet_enabled, is_active

wallet_enabled.toggle: Working - Can toggle wallet_enabled per location from Site Settings
wallet_enabled.filtering: Working - Resident Balance and Transaction Report show only wallet-enabled locations

dynamic_locations.menu_catalog: Working - Select Location dropdown from API
dynamic_locations.site_settings: Working - All locations with toggles from API
